details: Scheme launched by GR शासन निर्णय क्र. योजना-२०१९/प्र.क्र.१२१/उद्योग ७ dated on 01.08.2019 Scheme will be implemented and monitored by Directorate of Industries (DOI), under the administrative control of Industries Department, Government of Maharashtra. The Scheme will be implemented through District Industries Canters (DICs), Maharashtra State Khadi and Village Industries Boards (KVIB) under the control of Directorate of Industries and also by banks.
The maximum cost of the project/unit admissible under manufacturing sector is Rs.50 lakh.

The maximum cost of the project/unit admissible under service, Agro-based/ Primary Agro processing sector, E-vehicle based goods transport and other businesses, single brand service ventures (single brand-based chains, mobile service ventures) is Rs.20 lakhs.

Beneficiary’s Contribution in the project cost will be 5% to 10 % as per the Categories of Beneficiaries under CMEGP scheme and balance amount of the total project cost will be provided by Banks as term loan.
benefits: Special Category (includes SC / ST /Women/ Ex- servicemen / differently abled/VJNT/OBC/Minority)
eligibility: of the applicant should be between 18 to 45. For Special category (including SC/ST/Women/ Ex-servicemen/Differently abled) age is relaxed by 5 years.
unemployed youth, Youth willing to establish new ventures.
of the applicant should be Male and Female
minimum 7th standard pass for project/unit above Rs. 10 lac and for project/units above Rs.25 lac the required educational criterion for the applicant is minimum 10th standard pass.

online: Step 01: Fill online application on portal

Step 02: District level Scrutiny and Coordination Sub-Committee (DLSCC) constituted under the Chairmanship of respective GM, DICs will scrutinize the applications and prepare a primary list of eligible applicants.
Step 03: primary eligible applicants list will be approved by DLTFC and then forwarded to bank.
Step 04: Bank Sanctioning & Entrepreneurship Development Programme (EDP) training & Disbursment
Step 05: Subsidy claim by Bank to GM
Step 06: Approval of claim by HO and disbursement of margin money viz. nodal bank

Step 07: completion of three successful years of activity and following the timely repayment schedule as informed by the bank, the margin money in the form of grant-in-aid will be re-appropriated in the applicant’s loan account after confirmation / necessary validation from GM, DIC.

documents_required: 11) Clearance /approved certificate (bank)(If Working capital is zero for project cost more than 5 lac)

faqs.question: What is maximum project cost allowed under CMEGP?
faqs.answer: Rs.50.00 lakhs for manufacturing unit and Rs.20.00 lakhs for Service Unit.

faqs.question: What is Age limit ?
faqs.answer: Any individuals between 18 to 45 years of age. For special category age is relaxed by 5 years.

faqs.question: What is the definition of family ?
Whether Unit can be set up in urban Area.?
What are the main criteria of project?
faqs.answer: It should fulfill the criteria of rural area (for Rural Area project), own contribution, negative list and the unit should be new one.

faqs.question: What is lock in period for Govt. Subsidy?
Which are the financial agencies?
faqs.answer: All Public Sector Banks, Regional Rural Banks (RRB), Co-operative Banks, Private Scheduled Commercial Banks regulated by RBI and approved by SLMC of concern State.

faqs.question: Where does the beneficiary has to submit his/her application/ Project?
faqs.answer: Beneficiary can submit his/her application/Project online on CMEGP website. https://maha-cmegp.gov.in /homepage
